description: Create a DXF drawing of an equipment nameplate laser-engraving template for a stainless steel identification plate for agricultural machinery. The drawing must include three layers: 'BORDER' (color index 7), 'HOLES' (color index 2), and 'TEXT' (color index 4). On the 'BORDER' layer, include two rectangles: an outer border from (0,0) to (120,60) and an inner border from (5,5) to (115,55). On the 'HOLES' layer, include two circles with radius 2 centered at (10,30) and (110,30). On the 'TEXT' layer, include four labels centered horizontally near x=60: 'MODEL: AG-2024' (y=45, height 5), 'SERIAL: _______' (y=35, height 4), 'WEIGHT: 450 kg' (y=25, height 4), and 'MFG DATE: 2024' (y=15, height 4). Save the drawing as ~/Documents/LibreCAD/nameplate_template.dxf.
